## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New robot/automation
- [ ] Bug fix (workflow correction)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Testing

- [ ] Tested in UiPath Studio (Debug mode)
- [ ] Tested with sample data
- [ ] No `.local/` or `.settings/` files included

## Checklist

- [ ] `Main.xaml` is the entry point
- [ ] `project.json` has a meaningful description
- [ ] README.md updated (if adding new robot)
- [ ] No credentials or sensitive data committed
